name: Temporal Memory / First-Change Evidence
description: Actively track a transient first change through occlusion and later decoys, then recover its carrier after the field shuffles.
natural_language: Find the first change. Mark its carrier after the field settles.

metadata.notes: V2 requires an active cursor lens: the first change is brief and reverts, later decoys change, objects cross occluders, and identities shuffle before selection. The target event is guaranteed observable rather than randomly hidden.
